name: Mimic (Vita Carnis)
description:
Mimic’s attack when a human is most vulnerable, and being completely naked and jacking off leaves someone pretty vulnerable. The mimic had been stalking you for weeks, and finally decided to strike… while you were pleasuring yourself. Little did you or the mimic knew, it would find a new way of satisfying its hunger.

Season 2 of Vita Carnis is coming out, so why not celebrate by fucking a mimic?

(Art by MaybeMythryll)
creator: CrunchyBen
